repair_suggestion: Optional dependency 'paddleocr' is not installed. Install the parser-paddleocr extra or use backend=builtin.

backend.sample_input_type: PNG OCR image in live acceptance replay
known_limitations: P2.1 live acceptance proves OCR runtime invocation on a PNG sample.
PaddleOCR 3.2 strengthening adds scanned PDF page OCR routing with source page trace.
TIFF/JPEG support remains adapter-declared but not universally stable for this release.
PaddleOCR and model files are not bundled in the default install.
backend.fallback_behavior: If parser-paddleocr or local OCR model/runtime is missing, the report marks the backend unavailable/failed and preserves builtin fallback guidance.
